---
title: Outreach
title-block-banner: true
format: 
  html:
    page-layout: full
---


::: {.callout-caution collapse="true"}
## Work in preparation or submitted (newest on top)

- Santágueda Villanueva, M., Granell, C., Trilles, S. **Integración del pensamiento computacional en la formación inicial del profesorado de primaria: la experiencia Sucre4Kids**. *Submitted to XXIX Congreso Internacional de Tecnología Educativa [EDUTEC 2026](https://edutec2026.uji.es/)* (13 Mar 2026). 

- Celia Sáenz-Martínez, Carlos Granell, José Francisco Ramos, M. Torla-Tena, Sergio Trilles. **Implementing Interdisciplinary STEAM projects with Sucre4STEAM: from block-based programming to real prototyping in a rural school.** *Submitted to [Edulearn 2026](https://iated.org/edulearn/)* (12 Mar 2026).

- Celia Sáenz-Martínez, Belén Ibáñez Montoliu, José Francisco Ramos-Romero, Carlos Granell, Sergio Trilles. **Evolución de la plataforma *Sucre4Stem* para el aprendizaje del Internet de las Cosas en las aulas**. *Submitted to 2026 Congreso de Tecnología, Aprendizaje y Enseñanza de la Electrónica ([TAEE 2026](https://congresotaee.es/))* (15 Dec 2025).

:::


## Computational thinking papers

- Trilles, S., Juan, P., Santagueda Villanueva, M., Granell, C., Ramos, J. F. **SUCRE4KIDS: A Tangible Programming Approach for Introducing Computational Thinking in Early Education.** *ICERI25 Proceedings*, pp. 8779-8784, 2025, ISBN 978-84-09-78706-7. DOI: [10.21125/iceri.2025.2476](https://doi.org/10.21125/iceri.2025.2476). Seville, Spain, 10–12 Nov 2025.

<!-- Special Issue on "Coding, Computational, Algorithmic, Design, Creative, and Critical Thinking in K-16 education" -->
- [![2024](https://img.shields.io/badge/2024-10.1109/TE.2024.342266-brightgreen.svg)](https://doi.org/10.1109/TE.2024.3422666)
Trilles, S., Monfort-Muriach, A., Cueto-Rubio, E., López-Girona, C., Granell, C. **Sucre4Stem: A K-12 Educational Tool for Integrating Computational Thinking and Programming Across Multidisciplinary Disciplines.** *IEEE Transactions on Education*, 67(6): 868-877, 2024, ISSN 1557-9638. [CC BY 4.0](http://creativecommons.org/licenses/by/4.0/) | [[repositori UJI]](http://hdl.handle.net/10234/208941)

- Trilles, S., Granell, C., Ramos, J. F. **SUCRE4STEM's Dual Approach to Enhancing Computational Thinking and Programming Skills.** *EDULEARN24 Proceedings*, pp. 8094-8103, 2024, ISBN 978-84-09-62938-1. DOI: [10.21125/edulearn.2024.1908](https://doi.org/10.21125/edulearn.2024.1908). Palma de Mallorca, Spain, 1–3 Jul 2024.

- Granell, C., Trilles, S. **Alcance del pensamiento computacional en educación secundaria: Currículo nacional y percepción docente.** *OSF Preprint*, [osf.io/dze94](https://doi.org/10.31219/osf.io/dze94) (29 Jan 2024).

- Trilles, S., Monfort-Muriach, A., Lacomba, D., Granell, C. **Introducción a los conceptos del pensamiento computacional en educación infantil y primaria con programación tangible.** *Actas de las Jornadas sobre la Enseñanza Universitaria de la Informática (JENUI 2023)*, vol 8, pp 257-260, 2023, ISSN 2531-0607. Granada, Spain, Jul 2023. [CC BY-NC-SA 4.0](https://creativecommons.org/licenses/by-nc-sa/4.0/) | [[download]](https://aenui.org/actas/pdf/JENUI_2023_032.pdf) | [[repositori UJI]](http://hdl.handle.net/10234/204116) 

- Trilles, S., Monfort-Muriach, A., Cueto-Rubio, E., Granell, C., Juan, P. **Sucre4Stem: Internet of Things in Classrooms.** *2022 Congreso de Tecnología, Aprendizaje y Enseñanza de la Electrónica (TAEE)*, pp. 1-4, 2022, ISBN 978-1-6654-2161-4. Teruel, Spain, Jul 2022. DOI: [10.1109/TAEE54169.2022.9840703](https://doi.org/10.1109/TAEE54169.2022.9840703). [[repositorio UJI]](http://hdl.handle.net/10234/200644)

- [![2022](https://img.shields.io/badge/2022-10.1109/RITA.2022.3166854-brightgreen.svg)](https://doi.org/10.1109/RITA.2022.3166854)
Trilles, S., Monfort-Muriach, A., Gómez-Cambronero, Á., Granell, C. **Sucre4Stem: Collaborative Projects Based on IoT Devices for Students in Secondary and Pre-University Education.** *IEEE Journal of Latin-American Learning Technologies (IEEE-RITA)*, 17(2), 150-159, 2022, ISSN 1932-8540. DOI: 10.1109/RITA.2022.3166854.

- [![2020](https://img.shields.io/badge/2020-10.1002/cae.22319-brightgreen.svg)](https://doi.org/10.1002/cae.22319)
Trilles, S., Granell, C. **Advancing Preuniversity Students' Computational Thinking Skills Through an Educational Project Based on Tangible Elements and Virtual Block-Based Programming.** *Computer Applications in Engineering Education*, 28(6), 1490-1502, 2020, ISSN 1099-0542. DOI: 10.1002/cae.22319.

- Trilles, S., Tortosa, D., Granell, C. **La evolución del proyecto Sucre4Kids mediante el paradigma del Internet de las Cosas.** *Actas de las Jornadas sobre Enseñanza Universitaria de la Informática*, vol 5, pp 53-60, 2020, ISSN 2531-0607. Valencia, Spain, Jul 2020. [CC BY-NC-SA 4.0](https://creativecommons.org/licenses/by-nc-sa/4.0/) | [[download]](https://aenui.org/actas/pdf/JENUI_2020_009.pdf) | [[repositori UJI]](http://hdl.handle.net/10234/198339)


- Trilles, S., Granell, C., Aguilar-Moreno, E. **SUCRE4Kids: Tres años de experiencia en la incentivación del pensamiento computacional en edades preuniversitarias.** In: Fidalgo, A. V., Martínez Bonastre, O. (Eds). *TICAI 2018 TICs para el Aprendizaje de la Ingeniería*. IEEE, 2019, pp. 49-56, ISBN 978-84-8158-838-5. [[download]](http://romulo.det.uvigo.es/ticai/libros/2018/2018/Cap7.pdf)

- Granell, C., Trilles, S. **El proyecto SUCRE4Kids: Una iniciativa de hardware y software libre para la introducción a la programación.** *Novática*, num 240, 2018, ISSN 2444-6629. [[download]](https://www.novatica.es/el-proyecto-sucre4kids-una-iniciativa-de-hardware-y-software-libre-para-la-introduccion-a-la-programacion/) 

- Trilles, S., Granell, C. **SUCRE4Kids: El fomento del pensamiento computacional a través de la interacción social y tangible.** *Actas de las Jornadas sobre Enseñanza Universitaria de la Informática*, vol 3, pp 303-310, 2018, ISSN 2531-0607. Barcelona, Spain, Jul 2018. [CC BY-NC-SA 4.0](https://creativecommons.org/licenses/by-nc-sa/4.0/) | [[download]](https://aenui.org/actas/pdf/JENUI_2018_016.pdf)

## Reproducibility papers

- Nüst, D., Ostermann, F. O., Granell, C. **A peer review process for higher reproducibility of publications in GIScience can also work for Earth System Sciences.** *EGU General Assembly 2023*, Vienna, Austria, 24–28 Apr 2023. DOI: [10.5194/egusphere-egu23-15384](https://doi.org/10.5194/egusphere-egu23-15384).

- Granell, C., Sileryte, R., Nüst, D. **Reproducible Graduate Theses in GIScience.** *Abstract presented at Research Reproducibility 2020 conference*, 2020. [[download]](https://pwd.aa.ufl.edu/researchre-pro/wp-content/uploads/sites/8/2020/11/Paper_2-1_Granell_Carlos.pdf) | [[presentation]](https://osf.io/wcexy/)

- Nüst, D., Ostermann, F., Granell, C., Kmoch, A. **Improving Reproducibility of Geospatial Conference Papers – Lessons Learned from a First Implementation of Reproducibility Reviews.** *Septentrio Conference Series*, 4, 2020, ISSN 2387-3086. DOI: [10.7557/5.5601](https://doi.org/10.7557/5.5601).


## Media



## Outreach activities
